mapper.select: SELECT i.*, e.equipment_name FROM incidents i LEFT JOIN equipment e ON i.equipment_code = e.equipment_code WHERE i.incident_no = #{incidentNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO incidents ( incident_no, result_id, incident_datetime, finder, equipment_code, weather, temperature, incident_type, severity, incident_part, incident_detail, tmp_action, tmp_action_person, tmp_action_date, cause, counter_detail, status ) VALUES ( #{incidentNo}, #{resultId}, #{incidentDatetime}, #{finder}, #{equipmentCode}, #{weather}, #{temperature}, #{incidentType}, #{severity}, #{incidentPart}, #{incidentDetail}, #{tmpAction}, #{tmpActionPerson}, #{tmpActionDate}, #{cause}, #{counterDetail}, #{status} )
mapper.update: UPDATE incidents SET incident_datetime = #{incidentDatetime}, finder = #{finder}, equipment_code = #{equipmentCode}, weather = #{weather}, temperature = #{temperature}, incident_type = #{incidentType}, severity = #{severity}, incident_part = #{incidentPart}, incident_detail = #{incidentDetail}, tmp_action = #{tmpAction}, tmp_action_person = #{tmpActionPerson}, tmp_action_date = #{tmpActionDate}, cause = #{cause}, counter_detail = #{counterDetail}, status = #{status} WHERE incident_no = #{incidentNo}
mapper.select:
SELECT i.*, e.equipment_name FROM incidents i LEFT JOIN equipment e ON i.equipment_code = e.equipment_code
AND i.incident_type = #{type}
AND i.incident_part LIKE CONCAT('%', #{part}, '%')
ORDER BY i.incident_datetime DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT CONCAT('INC-', DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE, '%Y%m%d'), '-', LPAD( (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(incident_no, 15) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) + 1 FROM incidents WHERE incident_no LIKE CONCAT('INC-', DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE, '%Y%m%d'), '-%')), 3, '0'))
